category_sources: source_facts.description says the tool creates and manages the Hyperledger FireFly stack for blockchain interaction; official Hyperledger FireFly docs describe CLI-created local FireFly stacks for blockchain app development.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses FireFly CLI; source_facts.name is firefly and homepage is official Hyperledger FireFly documentation.
docs_sources: Official Hyperledger FireFly documentation includes tools and advanced CLI usage pages; official firefly-cli README documents installation and commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/hyperledger/firefly-cli; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Hyperledger docs identify FireFly stack management, blockchain interaction, and local development tooling.
